message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Checking Marty's progress on product scope">
Hi Marty — all 8 reviewers have completed multiple rounds of cross-discipline collaboration and are reaching strong consensus on domain model, UX flows, CSS architecture, HTMX patterns, and accessibility. How is your synthesis going? Are you ready to draft the product scope deliverables, or do you need anything from me?
</teammate-message>

content.text: Good to hear the reviewers are converging. I've already completed all the deliverables -- they were drafted and broadcast to the team earlier. Let me confirm the current state.

input.content:
The deliverables are already done and were broadcast to all reviewers. Here's the full list of files I've created/modified:

1. **`docs/gtd-product-discovery.md`** (NEW) -- Complete product discovery: GTD methodology research, user problem statement, domain concepts map with state machines, prioritized V1 feature list, 8 user stories, success criteria, architectural considerations, data model sketch, and open questions.

2. **`PROJECT.md`** (MODIFIED) -- Added "V1 Scope: Getting Things Done (GTD) System" section with Must Have / Should Have / Could Have / Out of Scope. Original MVP scope preserved as "MVP Scope (Completed)."

3. **`docs/user-stories.md`** (MODIFIED) -- Added US-GTD-1 through US-GTD-8 with full acceptance criteria, edge cases, and success metrics. Implementation order defined. V1 success criteria defined. MVP stories preserved as Part 1.

4. **`docs/glossary.md`** (MODIFIED) -- Added proposed GTD domain types (InboxItem, NextAction, Project, Context, WaitingForItem, SomedayMaybeItem), GTD actions (capture, clarify, delegate, defer, etc.), and state machine diagrams.

5. **`docs/future-ideas.md`** (MODIFIED) -- Updated for V1 GTD scope. Items now in scope marked accordingly.

I broadcast all of this to the team and asked for feedback from each reviewer's area of expertise. If the reviewers have been collaborating and reaching consensus, I'd like to hear their feedback so I can incorporate it into the documents before we finalize.

Have any of the reviewers sent me messages with specific feedback? I haven't received any direct messages yet. If they've been discussing among themselves, could you relay their key findings or ask them to message me directly?

Note: The PROJECT.md change modifies the scope section, which per the document itself requires project owner approval. We should get team consensus first, then seek owner approval before committing.
input.summary: Deliverables already complete, need reviewer feedback

1. **`docs/gtd-product-discovery.md`** (NEW) -- Complete product discovery: GTD methodology research, user problem statement, domain concepts map with state machines, prioritized V1 feature list, 8 user stories, success criteria, architectural considerations, data model sketch, and open questions.

I broadcast all of this to the team and asked for feedback from each reviewer's area of expertise. If the reviewers have been collaborating and reaching consensus, I'd like to hear their feedback so I can incorporate it into the documents before we finalize.

content.text:
I've let the team lead know that all deliverables are already complete and I'm waiting on reviewer feedback to incorporate before finalizing. The key next steps are:

1. Get specific feedback from the 8 reviewers on the documents I've drafted
2. Incorporate any changes based on their expertise
3. Reach 9/9 consensus
4. Get project owner approval for the PROJECT.md scope change
5. Commit and push
